items.title: AI taxonomy in this roadmap
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  aiNode["Artificial Intelligence"]
  mlNode["Machine Learning"]
  dlNode["Deep Learning"]
  genNode["Generative AI"]
  aiNode --> mlNode
  mlNode --> dlNode
  dlNode --> genNode
items.caption: Nested specializations: each layer is a subset of the one above. This topic owns the AI node; siblings own ML, DL, and Gen AI.

items.title: Broad vs narrow AI usage
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  broad["Broad AI: rules, search, ML, robotics"]
  narrow["Narrow AI: task-specific deployed systems"]
  agiGoal["AGI: research goal, not shipped"]
  broad --> narrow
  narrow -.->|"aspires toward"| agiGoal
items.caption: Broad AI is the full field; narrow AI is what we build today. AGI remains outside production systems.
